welcome_offer.description: Atmos Rewards Summit Visa Infinite: earn 80,000 bonus points and a 25,000-point Global Companion Award after spending $4,000 or more on purchases within the first 90 days of opening your account.
notes: Official Bank of America product/search result shows current Summit public offer: 80,000 bonus points + 25,000-point Global Companion Award after $4,000/90 days.
Replaces stale/expired 2026-06-30 Alaska offer values; no current public expiry date was visible in fetched/searchable issuer evidence.

open_questions: Confirm whether 2026-06-30 expiry is still correct or whether offer extended/changed.

Summit 100k remains live as a limited-time online offer according to Bank of America search-visible source and secondary sources; spend requirement differs across secondary snippets and should be issuer-verified before production apply.
Refresh official issuer/apply source before promoting this offer; expired 2026-06-30 values must not be applied as current/elevated.
